title: Ibergrif M34152 Silicone Toilet Brushes & Holders, Deep Cleaner, Toilet Brush with Quick Drying Holder Set for Bathroom
features: [DRIP-PROOF PROTECTION]: Round shape stable holder that keep brush turning over and falling. Toilet silicone brush has a intermediate hollow that is well-ventilated and allows liquid to drain, preventing bacterial growth, and keeping the floor dry.
[NON-SLIP HANDLE]: Toilet cleaning brush set with stainless steel ergonomic handles make it easier to clean, comfortable to grip and saving cleaning time.

[TPR MATERIAL]: Silicone loo brush bristles are made of soft and resilient TPR, which doesn’t scratch the surface of toilet bowl. Comparing with traditional toilet brush, it will not deform after a long time usage.

[DEPP CLEAN]: Cleaning brushes with soft silicone bristles can easily penetrate into hard to reach spots on the toilet and thoroughly clean stains. And it is not easy to leave stains, just need to rinse with water to become like new.The handle and base are removable.
[EASY TO PLACE]: Circular flooring toilet brushes bracket can stand stably on the ground.There is a hole of handle, which can hang on the wall alone.
description: From the manufacturer About Ibergrif Ibergrif is one of leading manufacturers and suppliers of sanitary and hardware products in Spain. With the unremitting pursuit of quality and lifestyle, our products are based on satisfying customers' needs and lifestyles. Our goal is to help customers live a better and more affordable life. Use Ibergrif to find inspiration for your kitchen and bathroom. Ibergrif Silicone Toilet Brush and Holder More efficient cleaning at 360 ° under the rim of toilet bowls. Soft TPR silicone cleaning heads that last longer. The supple and soft bristles help keep the toilet surface beautiful and free from scratches. Quick dry toilet cleaning brush set with hollow interior, drain the water and keep the brush dry and clean. Non-slip handle, comfortable to hold. Fixing to the floor or to the wall, without drilling, does not damage the wall. Features of Silicone Toilet Brush Easy to clean The toilet brush is easy to clean. Clean by rinsing with water after use. Stay away from strange smells. TPR silicone brush Soft and flexible. The soft TPR Bristle can clean deeply into corners and otherhard-to-reach places strongly, protects the glaze, is more robust and does not lose hair. Odorless Brush with cover: beautiful and odorless, automatic air drying. Ventilation holes: air circulation, accelerate the drying of the brush. Hollow design Toilet brush holder with hollow design can quickly evaporate water without accumulating underneath, without mold and odor, and can dry quickly and maintain hygiene . Hair doesn't tangle easily More convenient to clean Flooring Toilet Brush Flooring standing silicone toilet brush with holder is easy to move, saving space and not damage your wall.
